channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated by Frontion

item.title: 🇮🇷🇦🇪 Iran warns UAE over alleged Israel collusion after reported Netanyahu visit
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi warned Gulf states against cooperating with Israel after reports claimed Netanyahu secretly visited the UAE during the ongoing conflict. UAE denied the visit took place.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇧🇷 BRICS foreign ministers meet in Delhi as Iran war and oil prices test bloc unity
item.description: India hosts BRICS foreign ministers meeting where Jaishankar emphasized safe maritime flows through Hormuz and Red Sea. The Iran war and energy security dominated discussions amid divisions within the bloc.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚖️ Ukraine anti-corruption court places Zelenskiy ally Yermak under arrest
item.description: Former presidential chief of staff Andriy Yermak has been arrested on money-laundering charges in a major corruption probe, marking a dramatic fall for Zelenskiy's once most powerful aide.

item.title: 🇵🇭🏛️ Philippines seeks ICC suspect after Senate shootout chaos
item.description: Philippine authorities are hunting for Senator Ronald "Bato" dela Rosa wanted by the ICC after gunfire erupted at the Senate building where he had taken refuge. Marcos convened an emergency meeting.

item.title: 🇰🇷⚔️ South Korea showcases Cheongung-II missile defense and KF-21 fighter in military demonstration
item.description: South Korea's military offered a rare look at its flagship defense programs, demonstrating the Cheongung-II missile defense system and KF-21 fighter aircraft amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇷🇺⚠️ Russia places UK ex-minister Ben Wallace on wanted list
item.description: Russia has placed former UK Defence Secretary Ben Wallace on its wanted list, according to Reuters. The move comes amid escalating tensions between Russia and Western nations over the Ukraine conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦💥 Heavy Russian strikes on Kyiv kill one, wound 31
item.description: Heavy Russian missile strikes on Kyiv killed one person and wounded 31 others, according to RFI. The attacks continue the pattern of intensified Russian aerial assaults on Ukrainian cities.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 China's Xi warns of clash with US if Taiwan issue not handled properly
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping warned of potential conflict with the United States if the Taiwan issue is not handled properly during high-stakes talks with Trump in Beijing. The summit marks a pivotal moment in US-China relations.

item.title: ⚽🌍 Quarter of World Cup games risk searing heat, scientists warn
item.description: A quarter of World Cup games could face dangerously high heat conditions according to scientists, as France 24 reports on climate concerns affecting global sporting events.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇨🇳 Iran war overshadows Trump's China visit as peace talks stall
item.description: The ongoing Iran conflict is casting a shadow over Trump's summit with Xi Jinping in Beijing, with peace talks stalled and both leaders seeking to navigate the regional crisis.

item.title: 💰🇨🇳 Gold edges up on weaker dollar ahead of Trump-Xi talks
item.description: Gold prices rose slightly on a weaker dollar as markets awaited the outcome of high-stakes talks between Trump and Xi Jinping in Beijing.

item.title: 🛢️📈 Stressed crude oil market looks to Xi-Trump summit for Iran help
item.description: The increasingly stressed crude oil market is looking to the Xi-Trump summit for any positive developments on the Iran conflict, which has significantly disrupted global oil supply.

item.title: 🇨🇳💹 China's yuan hits 3-year high as stocks dip on Trump-Xi summit
item.description: China's yuan reached a three-year high against the dollar while stocks dipped as Trump and Xi began their high-stakes summit in Beijing, with markets watching for trade developments.

item.title: 🇺🇸🏛️ US House members defy leadership to force vote on Ukraine aid
item.description: US House members have defied party leadership to force a vote on Ukraine aid, highlighting the ongoing political battles over continued support for Kyiv.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇮🇳 Iran war casts shadow over BRICS foreign ministers meeting in Delhi
item.description: The Iran conflict cast a shadow over BRICS foreign ministers meeting in Delhi, with discussions focusing on regional tensions and economic uncertainty.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 Trump and Xi set for Beijing talks with trade truce and Iran war at stake
item.description: Trump and Xi are set for high-stakes talks in Beijing with trade negotiations and the Iran conflict at the forefront of discussions.

item.title: 🇷🇺🛢️ Russia's oil output down 460,000 bpd year-on-year in April, IEA says
item.description: Russia's oil production fell by 460,000 barrels per day year-on-year in April according to the International Energy Agency, as sanctions and market conditions impact output.

item.title: 🇺🇸🏦 Fed chair nominee Warsh set to get Senate nod as inflation intensifies
item.description: Trump's Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh is expected to receive Senate confirmation as inflation concerns continue to intensify.

item.title: 🇨🇳⚔️ China stages navy drill as US and Philippines embark on Balikatan exercises
item.description: China conducted naval exercises as the US and Philippines launched their joint Balikatan military exercises, highlighting regional military posturing.

item.title: 🇩🇪⚖️ Germany: 5 on trial after attack on Israeli arms firm in Ulm
item.description: Five people are on trial in Germany after an attack on an Israeli arms company in Ulm, Deutsche Welle reports.

item.title: 🇨🇳🤖 White Eagles and Persian Cats: Chinese AI satire on US war with Iran goes viral
item.description: A Chinese AI-generated satire titled "White Eagles and Persian Cats" depicting a fictional US-Iran war has gone viral, reflecting how the conflict is resonating in Chinese popular culture.

item.title: 🇨🇳💰 Does Iran have a yuan-for-Hormuz oil trade plan? Why analysts in China are urging caution
item.description: Analysts in China are urging caution over speculation that Iran might accept yuan payments for oil trade through the Strait of Hormuz, examining the economic and geopolitical implications.

item.title: 🇺🇸📈 Fed chair nominee Warsh wins confirmation with inflation in March
item.description: Trump's Federal Reserve chair nominee Kevin Warsh won Senate confirmation amid ongoing inflation concerns in March.

item.title: 🇺🇦💥 Ukraine says it struck Russian oil and gas infrastructure
item.description: Ukraine stated it struck Russian oil and gas infrastructure in continued attacks on Russian energy facilities.
